prompt:
Goal: Create a cinematic 2x2 comparison grid showing the same dark medieval-fantasy scene rendered as if by four different image models, with a white italic label in the upper-left of each panel.

Canvas: Wide 16:9 collage, four equal rectangular panels arranged in a 2 by 2 grid, no borders or gutters, each panel cropped like a film still. Cold desaturated blue-gray color grading, overcast sky, misty highland mountains, rocky cliffs, wet grass, distant valleys, dramatic natural light.

Layout: Exactly 4 panels. Top-left label: “Midjourney v8.2”. Top-right label: “Seedream 5.0 Pro”. Bottom-left label: “Muse Image”. Bottom-right label: “GPT Image 2”. Use elegant white italic serif text, small-to-medium size, placed near the top-left corner of each panel with slight softness, no text boxes.

Subject: Each panel depicts the same core scene: a rugged middle-aged male commander, a bearded medieval warlord, standing on a rocky mountain path with soldiers following behind him. He wears dark navy and black armor with steel plates, leather belts, medals, layered tunic or skirt armor, gloves, boots, and heavy weathered fantasy-war costume details. He carries a long halberd or poleaxe. His expression is stern and battle-worn, with windblown hair and a serious posture.

Panel details: Top-left panel should feel like the most polished cinematic fantasy still: close three-quarter view of the commander walking along a cliffside path, thick fur mantle around his shoulders, blue armor, sword or pole weapon partly visible, a column of soldiers blurred behind him, steep cliff rising to the right and foggy sea or valley to the left. Top-right panel should show a wider heroic full-body view: the commander stands on jagged rocks holding the halberd horizontally, distant troop formation marching on a mountain road at the right, vast gray valley and storm clouds behind him. Bottom-left panel should be a high-angle mountain pass scene: commander in the foreground looking downward, armored and holding a double-headed poleaxe, long visible line of troops snaking across the rocky landscape below, low clouds and mist over the mountains. Bottom-right panel should be moody and spacious: commander in dark armor standing on a rocky ledge with poleaxe angled downward, smaller soldiers behind him, towering cliff wall on the left, bleak valley on the right, heavy storm clouds.

Visual style: Ultra-cinematic live-action fantasy realism, epic historical drama atmosphere, high detail armor and fabric textures, subdued contrast, shallow depth of field in some panels, realistic mist, no bright colors. The overall prompt theme is a grim medieval commander leading an army through a stormy mountain pass.

Constraints: Keep exactly 4 labeled panels and exactly the four visible labels listed above. Avoid logos, watermarks, extra captions, modern objects, sci-fi elements, cartoon styling, or additional panels.
